visa_types.name: Visa Information
visa_types.overview: Please select the Emirate you live in to learn at which Visa Application Centre you can apply for a visa.
visa_types.full_text:
Please select the Emirate you live in to learn at which Visa Application Centre you can apply for a visa.

## Regions under the Jurisdiction of Japan
Consulate General of Japan, Dubai
Jurisdiction:
Applicants who reside/ living in Dubai and other Northen emirates may submit their applications at the Visa application in Dubai.
Please read the notice regarding booking appointments in Dubai.
Click Here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/jpn/dubai)

## Embassy of Japan, Abu Dhabi
Jurisdiction:
Applicants with a residence visa issued in Abu Dhabi would need to submit their applications at the Visa Application Centre in Abu Dhabi. The Embassy deals with those who are living in Abu Dhabi Emirate, and/or who have a residence visa from Abu Dhabi Emirate. Abu Dhabi residents with a residence visa from another Emirate must submit proof of living in Abu Dhabi, including a bank/credit card statement of daily expenditure for the last three months, tenancy contract, and TAQA bill.
Click Here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/jpn/abu-dhabi)
